title: hedyotis corymbosa
intro: Hedyotis corymbosa, also known as Ruoyan or Hedyotis diffusa, is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hedyotis corymbosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hedyotis corymbosa is often used in teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and sore throats.
